message:
feat(rchd): Add OpenTelemetry tracing and complete observability wiring

Add OpenTelemetry tracing initialization stub that can be enabled via
RCH_OTEL_ENABLED=1 and OTEL_EXPORTER_OTLP_ENDPOINT environment variables.
Wire decision latency tracking into worker selection (budget: <10ms).
Add classification_duration_us field to SelectionRequest for tracking
classification timing through the pipeline.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
